tEn: Sigmoid Loss for Language Image Pre-Training
tZh: 语言-图像预训练的Sigmoid损失
sEn: We propose a simple pairwise Sigmoid loss for Language-Image Pre-training (SigLIP) that outperforms softmax-based contrastive learning, especially at small batch sizes, and achieves 84.5% ImageNet zero-shot accuracy with only four TPUv4 chips in two days.
sZh: 我们提出了一种用于语言-图像预训练的简单成对Sigmoid损失（SigLIP），它优于基于softmax的对比学习，尤其是在小批量大小下，并且仅用四个TPUv4芯片在两天内就达到了84.5%的ImageNet零样本准确率。
absEn: We propose a simple pairwise Sigmoid loss for Language-Image Pre-training (SigLIP). Unlike standard contrastive learning with softmax normalization, the sigmoid loss operates solely on image-text pairs and does not require a global view of the pairwise similarities for normalization. The sigmoid loss simultaneously allows further scaling up the batch size, while also performing better at smaller batch sizes. Combined with Locked-image Tuning, with only four TPUv4 chips, we train a SigLiT model that achieves 84.5% ImageNet zero-shot accuracy in two days. The disentanglement of the batch size from the loss further allows us to study the impact of examples vs pairs and negative to positive ratio. Finally, we push the batch size to the extreme, up to one million, and find that the benefits of growing batch size quickly diminish, with a more reasonable batch size of 32k being sufficient. We release our models at https://github.com/google-research/big_vision and hope our research motivates further explorations in improving the quality and efficiency of language-image pre-training.
absZh: 我们提出了一种用于语言-图像预训练的简单成对Sigmoid损失（SigLIP）。与使用softmax归一化的标准对比学习不同，sigmoid损失仅对图像-文本对进行操作，不需要全局视角的成对相似度进行归一化。Sigmoid损失同时允许进一步扩大批量大小，同时在较小的批量大小下表现更好。结合锁定图像调整，仅用四个TPUv4芯片，我们在两天内训练了一个SigLiT模型，实现了84.5%的ImageNet零样本准确率。批量大小与损失的解耦进一步使我们能够研究样本与配对以及负正比例的影响。最后，我们将批量大小推到极限，达到一百万，发现增大批量大小的好处迅速减弱，更合理的批量大小32k就足够了。我们在https://github.com/google-research/big_vision上发布我们的模型，希望我们的研究能激励进一步探索提高语言-图像预训练质量和效率的方法。

contrib.en: Proposes a simple pairwise Sigmoid loss for Language-Image Pre-training (SigLIP).
contrib.zh: 提出了一种用于语言-图像预训练的简单成对Sigmoid损失（SigLIP）。

contrib.en: Sigmoid loss operates solely on image-text pairs without global normalization.
contrib.zh: Sigmoid损失仅对图像-文本对操作，无需全局归一化。

contrib.en: Enables scaling up batch size while performing better at smaller batch sizes.
contrib.zh: 支持扩大批量大小，同时在较小批量下表现更好。

contrib.en: Combined with Locked-image Tuning, achieves 84.5% ImageNet zero-shot accuracy with only four TPUv4 chips in two days.
contrib.zh: 结合锁定图像微调，仅用四个TPUv4芯片在两天内达到84.5%的ImageNet零样本准确率。

contrib.en: Disentangles batch size from loss, enabling study of examples vs pairs and negative-to-positive ratio.
contrib.zh: 将批量大小与损失解耦，便于研究样本与配对以及负正比的影响。

contrib.en: Finds that benefits of growing batch size diminish quickly, with 32k being sufficient.
contrib.zh: 发现增大批量大小的收益迅速递减，32k的批量大小已足够。

limits.en: Only evaluated on ImageNet zero-shot accuracy, not on other benchmarks.
limits.zh: 仅在ImageNet零样本准确率上评估，未在其他基准上测试。

limits.en: Training limited to four TPUv4 chips; results may not generalize to larger setups.
limits.zh: 训练限于四个TPUv4芯片，结果可能不适用于更大规模配置。

limits.en: Sigmoid loss may not outperform softmax-based contrastive loss on all tasks.
limits.zh: Sigmoid损失可能并非在所有任务上都优于基于softmax的对比损失。

limits.en: Study of batch size scaling limited to one million; larger batches not explored.
limits.zh: 批量大小缩放研究限于一百万，未探索更大批量。

limits.en: Models released but no analysis on downstream tasks like retrieval or captioning.
limits.zh: 模型已发布，但未分析检索或字幕生成等下游任务。
